title: ØSTERGRO / DENMARK
subtitle: GET INSPIRED! A ROADMAP TO REPLICATE KNOWLEDGE AND EXPERIENCE ABOUT FAIR FOOD SUPPLY CHAINS
description: A replicability guide presenting ØsterGRO, the first organic rooftop farm in Copenhagen, and outlining the partnerships, funding, and community-supported agriculture model developed for fair food supply chains. It offers practical insights and success factors to help urban stakeholders establish similar sustainable food initiatives in their regions.
